outcome.transcript:
[   2.0s] Customer: Hello.
[   6.0s] Kate: [happy] Hi, this is Kate calling about your 2025 Jeep Grand Cherokee. Our system has detected that it needs service for maintenance. I'd love to help you get that scheduled at Village Jeep — does that work for you?
[  19.0s] Customer: Yes.
[  26.0s] Kate: [happy] Wonderful! We have a few openings. How about Tuesday, May twelfth, at eight thirty in the morning, or one thirty in the afternoon? Or, we could do Wednesday, May thirteenth, at nine in the morning. Which of those times works best for you?
[  42.0s] Customer: One state, please.
[  46.0s] Kate: Could you please clarify which time you'd prefer? We have Tuesday, May twelfth, at eight thirty in the morning, or one thirty in the afternoon. And then Wednesday, May thirteenth, at nine in the morning.
[  60.0s] Customer: Wednesday.
[  63.0s] Kate: [happy] Excellent! So, to confirm, that's Wednesday, May thirteenth, at nine in the morning for your service appointment at Village Jeep. Does that sound right?
[  74.0s] Customer: Yes.
[  77.0s] Kate: [happy] Perfect! Your appointment for your 2025 Jeep Grand Cherokee at Village Jeep is confirmed for Wednesday, May thirteenth, at nine in the morning. We look forward to seeing you then! Thank you so much.
